subparts.text: How does International Marketing differ from domestic marketing, and what are the key challenges faced by company when expanding into International Markets? 1 How does socio-political planning and environment impact international marketing? 1 Why are brand delight innovations & adaptive engagement key to boosting global marketing ROI? 2 Why’s market segmentation key to boosting ROI of a successful international marketing campaign? 2 How can community nurturing boost brand leadership in competitive global markets? 3 How can product + packaging localization help speed customer acceptance in tough global markets? 3 How can business partners boost growth in diversified international markets for MNCs? 4 Explain the role of overseas agents in managing international distribution and marketing? 4 CO Mapping
